name: deeply-reader-skill
description: Evidence-grounded deep reading skill for book-like PDF, DOCX, EPUB, Markdown, and TXT files, producing useful intelligence, cognitive maps, and actionable reading notes.

skills.name: deeply-reader
skills.description: Create evidence-grounded deep reading HTML reports from whole-book files (PDF/DOCX/EPUB/MD/TXT). Use for book intelligence, cognitive maps, method extraction, actionable notes, and work/life reflection; not document editing, OCR, conversion, slides, or shallow mind maps.
